agent_prs.title: chore: clean up repo root — remove result artifacts, move scripts to scripts/
agent_prs.author: Copilot

assessment.purpose: Remove accumulated eval artifacts, generated code, and reorganize scripts into proper directory structure
assessment.rationale: Healthy housekeeping PR that removes 13.5k lines of auto-generated artifacts and reorganizes scripts. Changes are safe: .gitignore additions prevent future clutter, script moves with path fixes maintain functionality. Net -13,536 lines. Age: 3 hours. Still in draft - needs author to mark ready.
concerns: Still in draft state - waiting for author readiness
No labels applied - should have 'chore' or 'housekeeping' label
94 files changed is large but mostly deletions (13,545 vs 9 additions)
Scripts moved from repo root to scripts/ with path adjustments - verify imports work
Check status is pending - CI needs to complete
next_steps: Wait for draft->ready conversion by author
Wait for CI checks to complete
Verify moved scripts still run correctly (path fixes in verify_progressive_tests.py and test_outside_in_worktree.py)
Approve and merge once ready and checks pass
